channel.title: Serial on Built by Nikhil
channel.description: Recent content in Serial on Built by Nikhil

item.title: Day 8: Potentiometer, Serial Monitor, and Dimming an LED
item.description: Day 8 of Learn Coding with Arduino — your first analog input. Read a potentiometer knob, print numbers to the Serial Monitor, and use PWM to dim an LED smoothly.
